author: Ayush
text: 3NF mein transitive dependency nahi hoti, BCNF thoda aur strict hai bhai.

replies.author: Rahul
replies.text: Sahi baat hai, har BCNF 3NF hota hai par har 3NF BCNF nahi hota.

replies.author: Ayush
replies.text: Exactly! Viva ke liye bas itna yaad rakh le bohot hai.

replies.author: Priya
replies.text: Any real life example for this?

replies.author: Rahul
replies.text: Student -> Course -> Professor wala example best hai.

author: Karan
text: YouTube pe Gate Smashers ki DBMS playlist dekh le, mast samjhaya hai.

author: Sneha
text: Mera toh padh ke hi dimaag kharab ho gaya hai 😭

replies.author: Ayush
replies.text: Tension na le, pass toh ho hi jayenge sab.
